name: Chicken & Pasta Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch pieces
2 cans (14.5 oz) chicken or vegetable broth
1 package (1 lb.) frozen broccoli, carrots, cauliflower
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick Dutch oven or large saucepan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Heat over medium heat until hot. Add chicken, onion, and garlic; cook 4-6 minutes or until onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in broth, basil, and salt. Bring to a boil.
4. Add rotini; cook over medium-high heat for 8 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Meanwhile, place frozen vegetables in a colander or strainer; rinse with warm water until thawed. Drain well.
6. In a small bowl, combine 1 cup of the milk and flour; blend well.
7. Stir vegetables, milk mixture, remaining 3 cups milk, and bell pepper into rotini mixture. Bring just to a boil, stirring frequently.
8. Reduce heat to medium; cook 3-5 minutes or until soup thickens and vegetables and pasta are tender, stirring occasionally.
9. To serve, ladle chowder into 6 individual soup bowls. Sprinkle each with cheese. Makes 6 servings--270 calories--35 calories from fat--4 grams fat.
